steps.title: Find the perpendicular slope
steps.content: Line $k$ has slope $m$. A perpendicular line has the negative reciprocal slope, so line gamma has slope $-\frac{1}{m}$.

steps.title: Move one unit right
steps.content:
Line gamma passes through $(6{,}4)$. Moving from $x=6$ to $x=7$ gives a horizontal change of $1$, so the vertical change is
$$-\frac{1}{m}(1)=-\frac{1}{m}$$
The point is $(7{,}4-\frac{1}{m})$. The answer is A.
